stemHtml: Under what circumstances should a Contracting State waive the visa requirement for a crew member presenting a Crew Member Certificate (CMC)?

options.a: When arriving on duty on an international flight and seeking temporary entry.
options.b: When arriving off duty on an international flight and seeking temporary entry.
options.c: When arriving on duty on an international flight and seeking entry for less than 24 hours.
options.d: When arriving off duty on an international flight and seeking entry for less than 24 hours.
